# Task 03.01-project-and-config — Progress Details

- `MvcMusicStore.csproj`: Updated TargetFramework to net10.0; enabled Nullable and ImplicitUsings; added PackageReferences for Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.EntityFrameworkCore 9.0.0, Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer 9.0.0, Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Tools 9.0.0
- `appsettings.json`: Created with connection strings and app settings migrated from Web.config
